headline: Enhance Legal Services with Ethical AI
description: Deploy AI that handles document review, legal research, and client intake — with Ethics Gate™ ensuring confidentiality and accuracy.

pain_points.point: Document review is time-intensive and repetitive
Legal research takes hours of billable time
Client intake and onboarding is manual

solutions.title: Intelligent Document Review
solutions.description: Jamal analyses contracts, identifies key clauses, and flags potential issues — reducing review time by up to 60%.

solutions.title: Legal Research Acceleration
solutions.description: Comprehensive case law research and precedent analysis delivered in minutes, not hours.

solutions.title: Ethics Gate™ Confidentiality
solutions.description: Our Amanah pillar ensures attorney-client privilege is maintained at every stage of AI processing.
